data.content: No existing `Directory.Packages.props` found. I'll create it with the package versions and remove versions from the `.csproj`.

arguments.file_text:
<Project>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>true</ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageVersion Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Logging" Version="9.0.0" />
    <PackageVersion Include="System.Text.Json" Version="9.0.0" />
    <PackageVersion Include="Polly" Version="8.5.0" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>

data.content:
Done. Here's what I did:

1. **Created `simple-single-project/Directory.Packages.props`** — enables CPM with `ManagePackageVersionsCentrally` and defines all package versions centrally using `<PackageVersion>` elements.

2. **Updated `MyApp.csproj`** — removed `Version` attributes from all `<PackageReference>` entries, so versions are now managed solely from the props file.
